creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 209773
svn .diff

Increment PORTREVISION to fix a bad lib linking

Discussion with the author' s edbrowse: https://github.com/CMB/edbrowse/issues/53
for a more intelligent solution for this fix: bug #242471

Port changelog:

 * delete: LIB_DEPENDS libtidy.so:www/tidy-lib
 * delete: files/patch-src_html-tidy.c
 * add: post-patch to link the right library version


Testing:

 * portlint -C
 * port test
 * poudriere testport -j 130Camd64 -p default -i -o www/edbrowse


Thanks,
Alfonso
